documents.title: Commercial Housing Sales Contract PY-2024-0088
documents.content:
Contract No: PY-2024-0088
Buyer: Li Qiang
Seller: Vanke Co., Ltd.
Property Location: Room 2002, Building 3, Vanke Puyueshan, No. 88 Keji South Road, Nanshan District, Shenzhen
Floor Area: 128.50㎡
Unit Area: 102.38㎡
Total Price: RMB 8,560,000.00
Payment Method: Mortgage Loan (30% Down Payment)
Loan Amount: RMB 5,992,000.00
Delivery Date: 2025-06-30
Transfer Date: 2025-03-15
Default Clause: 0.05% of total price per day for late delivery

knowledge_base.question: How is the commercial loan amount calculated?
knowledge_base.answer: Commercial loan amount = property appraised value × LTV ratio (max 70% for first home). Housing provident fund loans are limited by three factors: account balance (typically 15-25x), monthly contribution amount, and local maximum cap. Combined loan = provident fund max + commercial loan for remainder. Monthly payment should not exceed 50% of household monthly income.

knowledge_base.question: What is Floor Area Ratio and Usable Area Ratio?
knowledge_base.answer: Floor Area Ratio (FAR) = total floor area / land area. Lower FAR means better comfort (villas <0.5, low-rise 1.0-1.5, high-rise 2.0-4.0). Usable area ratio = unit area / floor area, typically 78-82% for high-rises, 82-88% for low-rises.

transactions.detail: Payment ratio 42% exceeds progress ratio 35%, overpaid by 7%
Delivery delayed 120 days, behind schedule by ~4 months
